info.title: AI Platform - University Books API
info.description:
Enterprise SaaS API for AI-powered document evaluation and template management. Built with AWS CDK, Lambda, and API Gateway.

**Version**: v1 (current)

tags.name: Books - Workspace
tags.description: Book workspace for authors (draft/WIP progress tracking)

accessToken.description: JWT access token for API authentication

idToken.description: JWT ID token containing user claims

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expiresIn.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

password.description: User password (min 12 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)

phoneNumber.description: User phone number in E.164 format (optional)

destination.description: Masked email/phone where code was sent (e.g., a***@example.com)

codeDeliveryDetails.description: Details about where the verification code was sent

email.description: User email address to send reset code

newPassword.description: New password (min 12 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)
New password (min 12 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading the document

partSize.description: Size of each part in bytes

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading this part

uploadId.description: Multipart upload ID from initiate response

parts.description: Array of uploaded parts with ETags

hasNext.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevious.description: Whether there is a previous page

descriptionShort.description: Short description for list view (max 200 chars)

descriptionFull.description: Full description for detail view (max 2000 chars)

previewPagesKeys.description: S3 keys for preview page images

isAvailable.description: Whether book is available for download

isFree.description: Whether book is free (for future monetization)

GSI1SK.description: GSI1 sort key (createdAt for date sorting)

GSI2SK.description: GSI2 sort key (title for alphabetical sorting)

downloadUrl.description: Pre-signed S3 URL for downloading the book

addedBy.description: User ID who added this collaborator

userId.description: User ID to add as collaborator

description.description: Breve descrizione del contenuto del documento

templateId.description: Modello di partenza (identificatore libero, non UUID)

materialFileIds.description: File di materiale (contenuti da cui generare)

nextCursor.description: Cursore opaco per la pagina successiva

post.description: Authenticate user with Cognito and return JWT tokens
Obtain new access and ID tokens using refresh token
Performs GlobalSignOut to revoke all user tokens
Creates a new user account in Cognito User Pool
Sends a verification code to user email for password reset
Verifies reset code and sets new password
Allows authenticated users to change their password

post.summary: Generate presigned URL for document upload
post.description: Creates a presigned S3 URL for direct document upload

get.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific document

post.description: Start a multipart upload for large files (>5MB). Returns uploadId and metadata.

post.summary: Get presigned URL for upload part
post.description: Generate presigned URL for uploading a specific part of a multipart upload
Finalize multipart upload by combining all parts. Creates document metadata record.
Cancel an in-progress multipart upload and clean up uploaded parts
Create a new AI evaluation template with prompts and rubric configuration

get.description: Retrieve all templates with pagination. Filter by status (active/inactive/retired).
Retrieve complete metadata and configuration for a specific template

put.description: Update template configuration. Creates new version if template is active.

delete.description: Soft delete template. Only inactive templates can be deleted.

post.description: Make template available for use in evaluations
Disable template from being used in new evaluations
Create a copy of an existing template with a new name
Mark template as retired. Retired templates cannot be reactivated.

get.summary: List books with pagination and filters
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of books with optional filters for category, author, and search. Includes pagination metadata and available filter options.

schema.description: Search in title and author (partial match)

parameters.description: Search in title and author (partial match)
parameters.name: search

get.description: Retrieve complete metadata for a specific book. Increments view count asynchronously.

get.summary: Get download URL for book PDF
get.description: Generate a presigned S3 URL for downloading the book PDF. URL expires in 1 hour. Increments download count and records analytics event.
Retrieve workspace metadata for a book including progress tracking and template customizations.

put.description: Update writing progress, word count, and workflow status for a book workspace.

get.description: Retrieve all chapters for a book in order. Returns chapter metadata and content.

post.description: Upsert a chapter for a book. Creates if not exists, updates if exists. Auto-calculates word count.

get.description: Retrieve all collaborators for a book with their roles and permissions.

post.description: Grant a user access to collaborate on a book with specified role and permissions.
Create an immutable published snapshot of the book. Auto-increments version (v001 → v002). Atomic transaction ensures consistency.
Create a new authoring project (draft) from the wizard.

get.description: List authoring projects for the current tenant. Filter by status/kind/q.

patch.description: Update title, settings, sourceIds or coverTheme of a project.

post.description: Start (stub) generation: creates a draft Version (index) and a Job.
Cancel the active job and return the project to draft.

get.description: Poll the active job. On completion the project moves to review (index).
Return the current version (index + chapters) or null.

post.description: Develop all chapters from the approved index (stub).

put.description: Persist the set of approved chapter/index ids.

get.description: Return the authenticated user profile (Cognito access token).
List the tenant library sources. Filter by folder/tag/q.

post.description: Create a text note source (ingest ready immediately).

get.description: Presigned attachment URL for the source file.
Presigned inline URL for previewing the source file.

post.description: Esegue un'azione di ciclo di vita: publish | archive | reopen | duplicate | derive. Per `derive` passare anche `derivedKind` (e opzionale `language`). duplicate/derive ritornano 201 (nuovo progetto), gli altri 200.
